'''Ixnoltah''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who worked for [[Sebolto]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he earned a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on his head by the [[Pixelito Grand Council]] for dealing [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]] to the [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] youth of [[Pixelito/Legends|Pixelito]]. His bounty was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Behind the scenes==
Ixnoltah's bounty was worth 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,500 dead.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
